statement: In every magma, Equation 1822 (`x = (y * z) * ((w * w) * y)`) implies Equation 1124 (`x = y * ((y * (y * y)) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0988
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op w w) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op y y)) z))
